Pairing Steps:
1. Activate Bluetoth setting on your iPhone in "Settings-Bluetooth-On". 2. Put your original earbuds into charging case and open the lid, then long press the sync button on the front of the case until the green flashing. 3. When the pop-up window shows ”Airpod Pro” or the name you set for your earphone, click”Connecting” and wait for the process to complete. 4. Click the sync button to stop the flashing light or wait for it to automatically stop.
Common Fault and Eliminating Methods:
1. Single-sided Airpod Pro does not charge: 1) Clean the earbuds as well as and the charging case. 2) After the charging case is fully charged, put one headphone into charging case, wait for indicator light to go off for 3 seconds, and then put the other side of the headphones.
2. The headphones disconnect as soon as take them out from the charging case:
Charge the charging case for half an hour (put the earphones in), then press and hold the sync button for more than 20 seconds, then pair it again.
3. The Phone didn't pop up the pairing window?
1) Check whether the Phone has bluetoth enabled. 2) Due to some abnormal functions caused by the long running of the Phone, please restart the Phone. 3) Unlock the phone after the lock screen, remove the earbuds and put them back in.

a. Put your earbuds into the charging case, Activate the phone’s bluetooth settings. (Note: Two earbuds must be put into the charging case to ready pairing and charging).
b. Open the lid, it will automatically connect for your phone when you use it again.and while you need to press the Blue-tooth pairing sync button until green light flashes if the connection is failed, release button and access to the pairing mode.

d. Wait for the pairing to complete.When the phone is connected to the earbuds,you can open the lid to use them.

Common Fault and Eliminating Methods
Q: If no sound from a single earphone after pairing succeeded?
a)Clean the earbuds as well as and the charging case.
b)Put the earphones in the case, open and close the lid twice. Or take out the earphones to pair again.
c)This earphone may out of battery. Please put it back to the case for charging 15 minutes and then try again.
Q: If it failed pairing after multiple times or the headphones disconnect as soon as take them out from the charging case?
a) Please make the charging case fully charged,and put earphones back for charging , try to pair again.
b) Please let the earphones stand still on 15h to run out of electricity, turn off the lid after be put in charging case, then charge.
c.Make sure your phone already been upgraded to IOS12.2 or above.
Q: There' s one earbud no sound after long time leaving unused.
a) Please fully charge the charging case and the earbuds again for they are exhausted of battery in a long time unused.
b) Please check the earphones is connected to the phone.
Q: If the pairing window doesn't be popped up for a long time.
a) Please check if the Bluetooth has been enabled.
b) Please reset the phone.
c) Unlock the phone again after the screen locked,take out the earphones to pair once again.
Q: Failed to disconnect Bluetooth Connection after close the charging case with earbuds inside.
a) One of earbud is out of power,charged it take it back.
b) One of the earbud poorly contacts with the charging case. Clean the charging contacts point on the earphones, put it back and try again.
